name: Salat Iz Yaits
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Sour cream or plain yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sour cream/yogurt, mayonnaise, salt, and garlic in a bowl.
2. Add the chopped eggs to the mixture.
3. Stir in the remaining ingredients until well combined.
4. Garnish with pimientos before serving.
